docket_entries.description: 4:00 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. VICTOR HANSEN WAS PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF, SKYLINE REALTY. UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALITY, INC., A CAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT HADLEY, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HADLEY, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 GEARY STREET #702 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF. TO PAY DEFT. SUM OF $250.00 UPON RETURN OF KEYS TO PREMISE HEREIN. PROVIDED DEFENDANT PERFORMS ALL OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE STIP, PLTF. TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE ACTION HEREIN.
